items.h: Maya World Has Eyes On ROH Champion
items.p: Maya World has been on a tear in the ring after suffering a huge loss outside of it. She has a new goal after AEW's Owen Hart Foundation Cup tournament.

items.h: Chris Jericho's Father Helped Hide Him For Surprise AEW Return
items.p: Chris Jericho has detailed the great lengths he went to in order to keep his AEW return a surprise, with his father also playing a role.

items.h: Brian Cage Details Goals In And Out Of AEW
items.p: Brian Cage could be considered an AEW veteran at this point, but "The Machine" still has goals and aspirations for his AEW career.

items.h: WWE HOFer Diamond Dallas Page Says AEW Champion Takes Things 'Too Far' Sometimes
items.p: WWE Hall of Famer Diamond Dallas Page is a fan of a current AEW champion, but he thinks they do go too far sometimes.
"AEW Dynamite" saw a slight increase in viewership for its July 1 episode, the show featuring fall-out from AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door.

items.h: AEW Dynamite viewership up & 18-49 rating down for Forbidden Door fallout show
items.p: This past Wednesday’s AEW Dynamite averaged 634,000 viewers on TBS, up 2.9% from the previous week. It’s the second largest audience for the show since June 3rd. Dynamite averaged a 0.09 rating in...
